name: memorised-them-all
summary: Local, token-free file → knowledge-graph memory for any AI assistant (Claude, Gemini, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, ChatGPT's Codex, Grok). Convert any attachment to Markdown and digest it into a searchable graph + exportable notes, entirely on-device — deterministic and model-free (no LLM/GPU). Incremental re-digests, BM25 recall with document/entity-type/multi-project filters, and portable export/import/merge of memories.
